title: Thrixspermum pictum
taxonomy: Thrixspermum pictum is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It is a genus of orchids native to tropical Asia. The classification of Thrixspermum pictum reflects its evolutionary relationships with other orchids.
